repeated_spans.phrase: a weak spirit cannot stand against the pressure of life

illustration_reuse.note: everyday analogy ('Years ago, a young man from a farming village enlisted...') appears in near-identical form in both chapters

key_statement_reuse.note: ch02 key statement ('You cannot have victory unless you first decide to be strong.') and ch03 key statement ('Unless you decide to be strong, you cannot have victory.') share the same token set reordered

refrain_overuse.phrase: Strength is a decision before it is a feeling.
